task: View active rental contracts, equipment locations, rates, and due-back dates without calling the branch.
tool_today: Customer portal, spreadsheet tracker, phone fallback
decision_content: Usually none beyond confirming which assets remain on hire and when they are due back by project.

task: Request an equipment pickup or call-off when a job no longer needs the unit.
frequency: as work scopes finish or change
tool_today: Customer portal request form, phone to branch
decision_content: Choose when equipment can come off rent and which pickup window best fits the jobsite plan.

task: Request an extension on an active rental when project work slips or expands.
tool_today: Customer portal extension request, phone fallback
decision_content: Decide how long the project still needs the equipment and whether the request is urgent enough to escalate.

task: Download invoices and review outstanding balances for project cost tracking and accounts-payable coding.
frequency: per AP and project-cost review cycle
tool_today: Customer portal, PDF invoice download, internal AP workflow
decision_content: Match charges to the right project or cost code and spot obvious disputes before AP processing.

task: Make an online payment or update payment details against outstanding rental invoices.
frequency: per invoice cycle or delinquency follow-up
tool_today: Portal payment screen, ACH/card workflow, AP approval chain
decision_content: Choose which invoices to pay now and confirm the payment method and approval path.

task: Submit a field service request when rented equipment has a breakdown or damage issue on the jobsite.
frequency: when a rented unit fails or shows damage
tool_today: Customer portal service request, phone, mobile photos
decision_content: Judge whether the problem needs immediate service, a swap-out, or simple documentation for later follow-up.

task: Update billing or contact information for the account or active project contact list.
frequency: when contacts, jobsites, or billing details change
tool_today: Customer portal profile, phone and email fallback
decision_content: Ensure the change applies to the correct account, project, and contact route before it affects future billing or delivery communication.

task: Submit a self-service reservation or quote-driven rental request online when a new job needs equipment without waiting for branch hours.
frequency: when new jobs start or scope changes create rental demand
tool_today: Customer portal or e-commerce storefront, project plan, phone fallback
decision_content: Choose the equipment, timing, and jobsite details that fit the work, while the branch still reviews availability, pricing, and fulfillment constraints.
